name: Real Estate Purchase Agreement
description: A preliminary legal contract binding a buyer and a seller to the terms of a real estate transaction before the final closing.
content:
REAL ESTATE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Real Estate Purchase Agreement (the "Agreement") is made effective as of {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between the Seller and the Buyer named below, establishing the terms for the future sale and transfer of the property described herein.

1. THE PARTIES

A. SELLER:
Full Name / Entity: {{seller_name}}
ID / Tax No: {{seller_id}}
Address: {{seller_address}}

B. BUYER:
Full Name / Entity: {{buyer_name}}
ID / Tax No: {{buyer_id}}
Address: {{buyer_address}}

2. PROPERTY DESCRIPTION

The Seller agrees to sell, and the Buyer agrees to purchase, the real property and improvements located at:

  • Property Address: {{property_address}}
  • City / State / Zip: {{property_city_state}}
  • Parcel / Lot No: {{parcel_number}}
  • Property Type: {{property_type}}

3. PURCHASE PRICE AND PAYMENT TERMS

The total purchase price for the Property is {{purchase_price}}.

The Buyer agrees to pay the purchase price as follows:

{{payment_schedule}}

4. EARNEST MONEY (LIQUIDATED DAMAGES)

{{#if (eq earnest_money_included 'Yes')}}

The Buyer has delivered an Earnest Money deposit of {{earnest_money_amount}}. If the Buyer defaults or breaches this Agreement, the Seller may retain the Earnest Money as liquidated damages. If the Seller defaults, the Buyer is entitled to the return of the Earnest Money and may pursue further legal remedies.

{{else}}

No specific Earnest Money deposit has been established under this preliminary agreement.

{{/if}}

5. CLOSING AND TITLE TRANSFER

The closing of the sale and the transfer of the Title/Deed shall occur on or before {{formatDate closing_date}}. The Seller promises to deliver a clear and marketable title to the Buyer, free of any liens, encumbrances, or mortgages.

Closing costs, title transfer fees, and applicable taxes shall be paid by: {{closing_costs_responsibility}}.

6. POSSESSION

Physical possession of the Property shall be delivered to the Buyer on {{formatDate possession_date}}.

7. SELLER'S REPRESENTATIONS

The Seller represents that they have the legal authority to sell the Property and that, to the best of their knowledge, there are no undisclosed material defects or legal disputes affecting the Property.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Real Estate Purchase Agreement as of the date first written above.

SELLER
{{seller_name}}

Signature: _________________________

BUYER
{{buyer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: property_type
fields.label: Property Type
fields.placeholder: e.g., Single-Family Home, Vacant Land, Commercial Building

fields.name: payment_schedule
fields.label: Payment Schedule / Terms
fields.placeholder: e.g., $10k Earnest Money now, balance of $340k at closing.

fields.name: earnest_money_included
fields.label: Is there an Earnest Money / Deposit clause?

fields.name: closing_costs_responsibility
fields.label: Who pays Closing Costs / Transfer Taxes?
